specific_question: What proportion of the cybersecurity team's time is dedicated to analyzing and learning from externally available cybersecurity market data within the automotive industry, and how will that change by the end of 2025?
answer: The cybersecurity team at Elexion Automotive currently spends roughly just over half of their time on analyzing and learning from external cybersecurity market trends, also known as "threat intelligence". This proportion of the team's effort is planned to climb to roughly 60% by the end of 2025.
dr_question: Referencing the information shared in the April 2025 article from Help Net Security, what external cybersecurity market data involving the automotive industry should Elexion Automotive analyze by the end of Q4 2025 to protect consumer data and safety?
